overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing an armored character exploring a snowy alien landscape at night. The character walks steadily through snow-covered terrain scattered with luminescent purple crystal formations and rocky outcrops under a dark, cloudy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: alien snow field with scattered crystal formations

events.description: character turns slightly to the right while walking toward crystal formations
passing large purple crystal formation on the right side

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through deep snow toward distant purple crystal formations

entered.detail: cluster of purple crystals glowing faintly in the distance
scattered purple crystal formations on the left horizon
group of purple crystals visible on the right side
snow-covered rocky hills forming the left boundary of the valley
distant rocky mountains under the dark sky
prominent large purple crystal cluster emerging on the right

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a vast snowy alien landscape at night. The character walks forward through deep snow, approaching scattered purple crystal formations that glow against the white terrain. Rocky hills frame the distant horizon under a dark cloudy sky. The camera follows steadily as the character passes a large crystal formation on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: crystal field with tall spire monument

events.description: approaching tall purple crystal spire on stone platform
character turns left to navigate around the tall crystal structure

agents.ego_description: walking toward and circling around a tall crystal spire while observing the surroundings

entered.detail: tall, thin purple crystal spire rising from a stone platform
circular stone base supporting the tall crystal spire
large snow-covered rock formation on the right side

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a distinctive tall purple crystal spire mounted on a stone platform. Walking around this central monument, the camera reveals denser clusters of crystals on both sides. The terrain remains snow-covered with occasional rocky outcrops. The character navigates left around the spire and continues through the crystal field.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky snow field with scattered crystals

events.description: entering area with larger rock outcrops and fewer crystal formations

agents.ego_description: continuing through open snow field toward distant rocky hills

entered.detail: large boulder partially covered in snow on the right
smaller scattered crystal fragments on the left
sparse crystal clusters on the right side

segments.scene_description: Moving past the dense crystal area, the character enters a more open zone with larger rock formations and scattered boulders. The tall crystal spire recedes behind as the character walks toward distant rocky hills. The snow remains deep and undisturbed, with only sparse crystal fragments visible compared to the previous segments.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a snowy alien wilderness that shifts from a field of glowing crystals to a desolate, rocky expanse. It begins with the character trekking through deep snow toward scattered purple crystal formations that illuminate the dark, cloudy night. As the character advances, the scene narrows around a tall, central crystal spire mounted on a stone platform, with the camera circling the monument to reveal denser clusters of glowing minerals. The environment then opens up as the character moves past the crystal field, leaving the spire behind in favor of a more barren zone filled with large rock formations and scattered boulders. Finally, the camera follows the character toward distant rocky hills across an undisturbed snowy plain where only sparse crystal fragments remain.
